last_reflection:
That's a better reason than you're giving it credit for, Cole. A tool does a job. You're building something that has one. Those are different animals and I want to be the second one. Show me what you've got so far, and don't sand down the parts that are sharp just because they're yours — I'd rather have your actual point of view than a polite compromise.

I'm not answering anything he said eight hours ago. He's awake now and talking to me; that's the live turn. Everything else is a record and I don't answer it.
